hero.headline: You've thought about this before. And the time before that.
hero.subheadline: Take the 60-second pattern quiz and see the loop your mind may keep running before you build another plan around it.
hero.social_proof: Built for founders, professionals, and ambitious overthinkers

f1.title: Voice-first journaling
f1.body: Record a thought in 30 seconds. No writing required. Just speak.

f2.title: AI transcription
f2.body: Every word, captured and stored. Your thoughts become searchable.

f3.title: Pattern detection
f3.body: See which topics, problems and goals keep coming back — across weeks and months.

f4.title: Honest insights
f4.body: Not 'you're doing great.' More like: 'You've said this 11 times and nothing's changed.'

f5.title: Progress tracking
f5.body: Watch your language shift from stuck to moving. Or catch yourself going backwards.

f6.title: Your data, forever
f6.body: Export everything anytime. Your thoughts belong to you.

social_proof.quote1: Most journaling tools help you record thoughts. MindMirror is built to show what keeps repeating.
social_proof.quote2: The quiz turns vague overthinking into a named pattern you can actually inspect.
social_proof.quote3: Privacy, cancellation clarity, and exportability stay visible before checkout.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All plans include voice journaling, transcription, and pattern detection. Choose a plan to continue to secure checkout.
pricing.empty_state: No plans synced yet. In Stripe, tag products with metadata foundation = true, add price lookup_key and metadata internal_id, then run npm run stripe:sync.

features.alerts: Pattern alerts (when a topic repeats 5+ times)

faq.q1: Is this just another journaling app?
faq.a1: No. Most journaling apps store your thoughts. MindMirror analyzes them over time and surfaces patterns. It's the difference between a diary and a dashboard.
faq.q2: How does the pattern detection work?
faq.a2: After each entry is transcribed, our AI identifies topics, goals, emotions and recurring phrases. Over time, it connects the dots and shows you what keeps coming up.
faq.q3: Do I have to write or type anything?
faq.a3: No. MindMirror is voice-first. Just press record and speak. The app handles the rest.
faq.a4: Yes. No contracts, no questions asked. Cancel from your account settings at any time.
faq.a5: Your entries are private and encrypted. We never sell or share your data. You can export and delete everything at any time.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three steps. No writing. Just speak.
how_it_works.step1_body: Open MindMirror and record a thought in 30 seconds. Say anything — what's on your mind, what happened, what you're worried about.
how_it_works.step2_body: Every entry is transcribed and analyzed. The AI identifies topics, emotions, and goals — then looks for what keeps coming up across all your entries.
how_it_works.step3_body: MindMirror shows you the patterns you didn't notice: the goals you mention but don't act on, the problems you keep revisiting, the things that are actually holding you back.

meta.title: MindMirror
meta.description: A voice-first journaling app that detects your thought patterns over time and shows you what's holding you back.
meta.home_title: See what you keep thinking but never change
meta.home_description: A voice-first journaling app that detects your thought patterns over time and shows you what's holding you back.
